title: GP Fund Solutions Data Intern Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your GP Fund Solutions Data Intern interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your Latham, NY internship.
content:
# GP Fund Solutions Data Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your GP Fund Solutions Data Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Latham, NY
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from GP Fund Solutions
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

GP Fund Solutions is offering a Data Intern internship position in Latham, NY. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research GP Fund Solutions's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your GP Fund Solutions interview and increase your chances of success.
